image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you seagrass meadows are vital yet often overlooked?
Context visual: These underwater gardens cover vast areas, providing homes for countless marine species.
Escalation visual: But they do more than house fish. They capture carbon—helping fight climate change.
Evidence visual: Studies show they can store up to 83 million tons of carbon yearly, but...
Payoff visual: They’re declining rapidly due to pollution and coastal development. What can we do?
Cta visual: Join the fight! Support seagrass conservation. Your actions matter.
